programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
Film Stars Don't Die in Liverpool
The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: As Jorge solidifies his grip on the cartel, Thony is forced to reckon with the cost of survival and the choices that define her.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: With threats from all sides closing in, Thony takes a drastic step to secure her freedom that could change everything.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: With Ramona's increasing presence, the Sin Cara family faces off for dominance; when Luca's honesty threatens the family's secrets, Thony must make a tough decision.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Settling into their new arrangement, Thony tries calling the shots with Ramona; Fiona has a heart-to-heart with Chris and Jaz as the family's dynamic makes big changes.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.sub-title: I Heard It Through The Grapevine

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: As Thony fights to save a life, she finds herself caught between two men and the ghosts of their pasts; Jorge's relentless pursuit of vengeance blinds him to the truth.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony must find a way to protect her freedom and family as she finds herself surrounded by chaos; when Jorge catches wind of Ramona's plans, he's willing to do anything to stop her.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: As Fiona finds new security, a fatal decision changes her relationship with Thony forever.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone is excited to move into her dorm, but her past choices present unexpected setbacks. Meanwhile, Damon and Coach Marcus are thrown a bigger curve ball than they were anticipating.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Damon and JR try to boost team morale, Simone extends an olive branch to Thea, and Keisha's secret is revealed. Plus, Coach Marcus makes a surprising discovery.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: When the power goes out, everyone takes the time to reveal some surprising truths to each other. Meanwhile, Simone grapples with telling her friends about her son when she learns he will be in town for a visit.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: When Simone is faced with her first college level tournament, she learns she has to conquer an unexpected bigger foe and gets some sage advice from Thea.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone and the gang rally around Amara as she struggles with what to do next, an old teammate could possibly derail the all-HBCU baseball game, and Thea has a close call with danger.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Excited about service week, Simone channels all her volunteer efforts into her mentee and gets an idea for a bigger project, and gets assistance from some unexpected allies.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone throws herself into distraction, Damon finds help from Thea, and JR realises he needs to change how he sees himself. Plus, Coach Marcus' paranoia is at an all-time high.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: During Homecoming week, Simone and Thea get ready to compete in a professional tournament. Also, coach Marcus reveals a secret, and Keisha is ready to face her fears.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone grapples with her role on the tennis team, Thea receives some upsetting news, and an interim coach steps in for Coach Marcus. Cam's decision has major consequences.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone works on a group assignment, Damon struggles to bond with the team, Keisha wrestles with letting go of her dream, and Amara feels the cost of being a whistleblower.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Damon and JR try to boost team morale, Simone extends an olive branch to Thea, and Keisha's secret is revealed. Plus, Coach Marcus makes a surprising discovery.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone juggles playing doubles and spending time with an unexpected guest. Damon's relationship with Simone hits a snag, and Amara and Coach Marcus' past comes to the forefront.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone is excited that Baby Shay is coming to town, but another visitor she wasn't expecting surprises her as well. Damon struggles on the field. A family drama could threaten his new bond with his mum.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We marvel at some truly awful driving that could only of been carried out by those possessing some Staggering Stupidity, before switching focus from wheels to legs.

programme.title: Killing Bigfoot
programme.desc: Jessica and her wheelchair-bound husband Bret live in a heavily wooded area of Texas. They say, they're being terrorised by Bigfoot pounding on the walls of their house, and screaming and wailing in the night.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Kat Graham and Greg Proops feature as special guests.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Tara Lipinksi and Keegan-Michael Key feature as special guests.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: As the Oak Island team pushes to identify who is behind the 229-year-old mystery, a new probe drilling operation in the Garden Shaft could help finally unearth the treasure.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We briefly ditch the cars and witness the hapless Pedestrian Pile Up before whipping out our magnifying glasses to investigate The Scene Of The Crime.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Verne Troyer and Nyima Funk feature as special guests.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Darren Criss and Jeff Davis feature as special guests.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess" "Worst Case Scenario" "Redneck Good Times" and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess" "Worst Case Scenario" "Redneck Good Times" and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: As the comedians reach the halfway point of the competition, Frankie Boyle decides it's the right time to impress with his magnificent falsetto.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Police deal with a motorway menace who is six times over the limit, crashing into cars and continuing to drive. Sergeant Andy Meale diffuses a 30-year-old bomb.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Emergency services race to save a driver in cardiac arrest. A drunk driver races to his date. A tired motorist isn't going anywhere fast when she blacks out at the wheel.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Colette must test Noa's driving skills while Ceci helps Barb prepare for her new manager portrait.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Victorville, Brandi and Jarrod's mischievous side emerges. Ivy grabs a locker that no one else can tolerate, while Mary puts the new guy in his place.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: A Metamorphic Layer Of True Romanticism
programme.desc: Ivy takes it to the house in nearby Lancaster, while Dave takes advantage of being so close to Ivy. Meanwhile, Justin pushes all of Rene's buttons, and comes out ahead.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The Mackay House Movers run into damage and deadlines carting two massive sections of house from Brisbane to Condamine. Paul Cunningham attempts to make history moving the largest wind turbines in Australia.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Police deal with a motorway menace who is six times over the limit, crashing into cars and continuing to drive. Sergeant Andy Meale diffuses a 30-year-old bomb.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Emergency services race to save a driver in cardiac arrest. A drunk driver races to his date. A tired motorist isn't going anywhere fast when she blacks out at the wheel.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Craig's newest driver must prove himself on the Mud Mountain. Facing ice, muck, and massive pressure, Theron tries to stay ahead of the fleet, only to be stopped by someone else's mistake.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Polar boss Mark Kohaykewych shakes things up when he brings new soldier Mike Simmons into the winter roads battle. But when the rookie's paired with company wild card Art Burke, it makes for a rocky trip.

programme.title: Deadman's Curse
programme.sub-title: The Troubling Tale Of Bute Inlet Gold Pt. 2
programme.desc: The team in Bute Inlet continue to follow new leads in search of answers behind a missing or murdered prospector, while David Muise inches closer to gold in Pitt Lake.

programme.title: The Daily Show
programme.desc: Ronny Chieng interviews chef Sean Sherman about his cookbook "Turtle Island: Foods and Traditions of the Indigenous Peoples of North America".

programme.desc: In Victorville, Brandi and Jarrod's mischievous side emerges. Ivy grabs a locker that no one else can tolerate, while Mary puts the new guy in his place.

programme.title: Ashes: 2017/18 3rd Test
programme.desc: The 2017/18 Ashes saw Australian captain Steve Smith shine at the Gabba and Perth, while future captain Pat Cummins made a statement in his first Ashes series. England's Alastair Cook delivers a double century in his final Ashes series.

programme.title: Ashes: 1994/95 5th Test
programme.desc: The 94-95 Ashes series showcased a dominant Australian team, Mark Taylor and David Boon delivered exceptional batting, while McDermott and Warne led the bowling attack.

programme.desc: West Indies will be looking to turn around their fortunes in the ODI's after going down 3-1 in the T20's.

programme.title: Ashes: 1998/99 2nd Test
programme.desc: The 1998/99 Ashes featured career highlights for stars Glenn McGrath and Justin Langer, while England fought back valiantly with contributions from Dean Headley and Mark Butcher.

programme.title: Ashes: 2002/03 3rd Test
programme.desc: The 2002/03 features an Australian outfit in their prime. A relentless bowling attack from Glenn McGrath and Jason Gillespie, a stunning MCG Test double century for Justin Langer, and finally, an Australian legend gets his "Perfect Day."

programme.desc: West Indies will be looking to turn around their fortunes in the ODI's after going down 3-1 in the T20's.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is back and now he's one of the good guys, assigned to protect freedom fighter John Connor from a cyborg sent by the leader of the human resistance in the future.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: Marty McFly ends up in the wild west of 1885 to save mad scientist Doc Brown from a crazed gunfighter. It's the final chapter in the time-travelling comedy series.

programme.title: Top Secret!
programme.desc: In this rock 'n' roll spy spoof, an Elvis-like pop idol who becomes embroiled in intrigue on a tour of East Germany and falls in love with a French Resistance Fighter.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Haunted by his failure to protect JFK in Dallas, a Secret Service agent is taunted by a psychopath stalking the current president.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie glamorizes a busy part of her home; Belinda and Lee face a leaking roof and looming wedding; Jane and Rory move into their new chateau.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie glamorizes a busy part of her home; Belinda and Lee face a leaking roof and looming wedding; Jane and Rory move into their new chateau.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: If You Go Down To The Woods Today...
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: If You Go Down To The Woods Today...
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Chinese ceramics expert Lars Tharp sees a rare double Ming dynasty vase bought in a charity shop, and Raj Bisram discovers some valuable Beatles memorabilia.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Chinese ceramics expert Lars Tharp sees a rare double Ming dynasty vase bought in a charity shop, and Raj Bisram discovers some valuable Beatles memorabilia.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 59-year-old woman is rushed to Emergency after suffering a suspected stroke. Meanwhile, a 19-year-old girl has fallen 20 feet onto concrete after locking herself out of her flat.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: People bring prized possessions for evaluation and pricing.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams go head-to-head in a bid to sell their recently acquired items for a profit at auction.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp presides as two teams scour the antiques shops of York, each determined to buy three items that will make a profit at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil Spencer explores some of New Zealand's most stunning and desirable homes - from luxury mountain retreats to urban architectural wonders.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil Spencer explores some of New Zealand's most stunning and desirable homes - from luxury mountain retreats to urban architectural wonders.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a rock-climbing couple find a North Yorkshire home near the hills and visits the Great Yorkshire Show.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson is in Suffolk on a grand property search with a couple hotfooting it from the other side of the world to set down roots in the British countryside with their 900,000-pounds budget.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Tracey & Joel bought Adelaide's worst house. Tracey loves their 90-year-old home, but Joel finds it too small. Will Andrew find a better home, or will Neale's renovation solve it?

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Tracey and Joel say they bought the worst house in the best street in Adelaide. While local Pastor Tracey loves the character of their 90-year-old home, husband Joel is less of a fan and feels it's not big enough for their family of five. Can Andrew shine a light on better homes, or will Neale's renovation solve their dilemmas?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Charles and Dale have lived in their Pymble home 32 years and raised four kids here. Their youngest, Heath, is still at home but it's time for them to sell and downsize. Can the team help them start the next chapter?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Anand and his parents are ready to leave Melbourne and make the move to sunny Queensland to join their extended family. His 1970s house was passed at auction, so can the team help update its retro look and sell it?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a rock-climbing couple find a North Yorkshire home near the hills and visits the Great Yorkshire Show.

programme.desc: Fiona Bruce meets a Highland Games commentator with treasures including a shot put, a hammer and a brooch from Queen Victoria.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Orange and gold walls may have been right on trend in the '80s, but trends change, so Juliet is going to bring this living room in line with a modern design trend by creating a calming Hamptons look.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 50-year-old woman and her 68-year-old mother are involved in a serious car crash. Meanwhile, a seven-year-old boy is rushed into Emergency after falling from a chair at a wedding.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 50-year-old woman and her 68-year-old mother are involved in a serious car crash. Meanwhile, a seven-year-old boy is rushed into Emergency after falling from a chair at a wedding.

programme.title: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: A crackpot New York cabbie lands in trouble after his conspiracy magazine attracts the interest of shady government heavies and leads to five unexplained murders.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Based on a terrifyingly true and tragic story, a fishing crew sail into a disastrous storm when three hurricanes merge, creating mountainous waves.

programme.title: Wedding Wars
programme.desc: In the midst of organising his brother Ben's wedding, Shel, a gay party planner, decides to go on strike for equal rights when he learns that Ben is behind a political speech against gay marriage.

programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 2
programme.desc: A Portokalos family secret brings the beloved characters back together for an even bigger and Greeker wedding.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: A wisecracking New Yorker, whose one-night stand with a beautiful Mexican girl comes back to bite him - all the way to the altar.

programme.title: Roboshark
programme.desc: What starts off as a typical day on the streets of Seattle soon becomes a terrifying bloodbath, when a great white shark devours an alien space probe - and Roboshark is born.

programme.title: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: This is the original story of the man who became Dracula, a young prince whose people were threatened by a warlord and who protected them the only way he could: by becoming a monster.

programme.title: Lake Placid
programme.desc: An investigative team, armed with high-powered weaponry and a biting sense of sarcasm, must work together to defeat Black Lake's most ferocious resident: a 30-foot, prehistoric crocodile.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Rick O'Connell returns to combat a long-entombed emperor who threatens to plunge the world into his merciless service, with the chase going from Shanghai to high into the Himalayas.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: Based on the hit '90s animation, the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles are back and have teamed up with news reporter April O'Neill to save New York City from the evil Shredder.

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: The origin story of half-human, half-Atlantean Arthur Curry takes him on the journey of his lifetime - to discover whether he is worthy of who he was born to be: a king.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel is sent to Japan to live with his father, he is hooked on the treacherous world of street racing.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment, Ethan chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the wrong hands. The IMF team must stop the fallout.

programme.title: Apples Never Fall
programme.desc: During a hurricane, Brooke faces her demons while the detectives pursue a surprising new lead in Joy's disappearance.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: Following his shootout with Bianca, the Jackal must escape his captors and regroup ahead of his hit on UDC. Meanwhile, Bianca tracks his trail of devastation through the Hungarian countryside.

programme.title: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Something sinister lurks in the garden.

programme.title: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Ginevra struggles with the secrets of the Ristuccia family.

programme.title: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Ginevra struggles with the secrets of the Ristuccia family.

programme.title: Cheeky Business
programme.desc: The crew find a hole in the cash box; Stephanie and Simon suspect that Toni is planning a project behind their backs, so they follow him and end up on the set of an adult movie shoot.

programme.title: Cheeky Business
programme.desc: The crew find a hole in the cash box; Stephanie and Simon suspect that Toni is planning a project behind their backs, so they follow him and end up on the set of an adult movie shoot.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: A series of murders point to a killer within the police force. The case holds deep personal ramifications for the team led by DI David Bradford.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hornsby marches Daryl and troops to confront Maggie at Hilltop. After a harrowing heist, Rosita gets Connie, Kelly, Eugene, and Max to investigate the Miltons.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: Following his shootout with Bianca, the Jackal must escape his captors and regroup ahead of his hit on UDC. Meanwhile, Bianca tracks his trail of devastation through the Hungarian countryside.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: A community canvass keeps Milo's case alive, but Peter's frustration pushes him to take dangerous action on his own.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: As the search for Milo intensifies, Alcaras faces a moral dilemma when offered information that could compromise his integrity.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The sudden death of Charity Highmore-Browne by an arrow brings Mike and his team into the realm of New Zealand's colonial past, as they deal with a blacksmith, a missionary and the local postmaster.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The sudden death of Charity Highmore-Browne by an arrow brings Mike and his team into the realm of New Zealand's colonial past, as they deal with a blacksmith, a missionary and the local postmaster.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hornsby marches Daryl and troops to confront Maggie at Hilltop. After a harrowing heist, Rosita gets Connie, Kelly, Eugene, and Max to investigate the Miltons.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: A community canvass keeps Milo's case alive, but Peter's frustration pushes him to take dangerous action on his own.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: As the search for Milo intensifies, Alcaras faces a moral dilemma when offered information that could compromise his integrity.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: As the search for Milo intensifies, Alcaras faces a moral dilemma when offered information that could compromise his integrity.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Negan rush to the Commonwealth to stop Hornsby from going after their families. Pamela deals with protesters demanding justice for Sebastian's crimes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Negan rush to the Commonwealth to stop Hornsby from going after their families. Pamela deals with protesters demanding justice for Sebastian's crimes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol makes a deal with Pamela to wipe the slate clean on behalf of her friends. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah get on the road to Oceanside to fill them in on a plan.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: Atomic
programme.desc: Max and JJ attempt to reach Marrakech through Syria, where one's past resurfaces. Meanwhile, Cassie's ex-CIA colleague Mark Ellis arrives to help track them down.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: A series of murders point to a killer within the police force. The case holds deep personal ramifications for the team led by DI David Bradford.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: A series of murders point to a killer within the police force. The case holds deep personal ramifications for the team led by DI David Bradford.

programme.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
programme.desc: A stunning adaptation of Arthur Golden's bestselling novel set in an exotic world tells the story of a servant who blossoms against all odds to become the most enchanting geisha of her day.

programme.title: Love Happens
programme.desc: A grieving self-help guru and a recently single florist's lives come crashing together at exactly the wrong time. Does love stand a chance?

programme.title: Love Happens
programme.desc: A grieving self-help guru and a recently single florist's lives come crashing together at exactly the wrong time. Does love stand a chance?

programme.title: A Sweet Christmas Romance
programme.desc: When a food stylist finds out the owner of her favorite bakery is retiring and sponsoring a baking contest to see who will be her successor, she enters but then is forced to join forces with a rival chef.

programme.title: A Sweet Christmas Romance
programme.desc: When a food stylist finds out the owner of her favorite bakery is retiring and sponsoring a baking contest to see who will be her successor, she enters but then is forced to join forces with a rival chef.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: In the steamy second chapter of the best-selling blockbuster, a wounded Christian tries to entice a cautious Ana back into his life.

programme.title: Arthur Christmas
programme.desc: On Christmas night at the North Pole, Santa's youngest son looks to use his father's high-tech operation for an urgent mission.

programme.title: Arthur Christmas
programme.desc: On Christmas night at the North Pole, Santa's youngest son looks to use his father's high-tech operation for an urgent mission.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a radioactive spider bite, a nerdy teen develops keen senses and amazing strength.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a radioactive spider bite, a nerdy teen develops keen senses and amazing strength.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: Balto
programme.desc: A true story of a sled dog who braved the Alaskan wilderness to carry life-saving medicine to a remote village in 1925. A remarkable tale of a hero who inspired a nation.

programme.title: Balto
programme.desc: Part husky/part wolf, Balto doesn't know where he belongs. He's an outcast in Alaska, except to his true friends - Boris, the Russian snow goose; polar bear cubs Muk and Luk; and the beautiful husky, Jenna. Even though he's different, all of Balto's friends recognise what he still can't see himself: his noble spirit. One day, a serious diphtheria epidemic spreads fast among the children of Nome. When a fierce blizzard closes off all routes of transport, there's no way to obtain lifesaving medicine unless a team of sled dogs can race six-hundred miles through the blinding Arctic storm and bring back anti-toxin. But when the dogs get lost in the frozen wilderness, only Balto can rescue the team and save the children.

programme.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
programme.desc: Spirit is a wild and rambunctious stallion who travels across the frontiers of the Old West; where he befriends a young human and finds true love with a mare.

programme.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
programme.desc: Spirit is a wild and rambunctious stallion who travels across the frontiers of the Old West; where he befriends a young human and finds true love with a mare.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Richard the Stork and the Mystery of ...
programme.desc: Little sparrow Richard meets a flock of sparrows who are being held captive by the peacock Zamano. To regain their freedom, they have to go on a great adventure together and find a mysterious treasure.

programme.title: Richard the Stork and the Mystery of ...
programme.desc: Little sparrow Richard meets a flock of sparrows who are being held captive by the peacock Zamano. To regain their freedom, they have to go on a great adventure together and find a mysterious treasure.

programme.title: Storks
programme.desc: Storks deliver babies or at least they used to. Now they deliver packages for a global internet retail giant. Junior, the company's top delivery stork, is about to be promoted when he accidentally activates the Baby Making Machine, producing an adorable and wholly unauthorised baby girl.

programme.title: Storks
programme.desc: Storks deliver babies or at least they used to. Now they deliver packages for a global internet retail giant. Junior, the company's top delivery stork, is about to be promoted when he accidentally activates the Baby Making Machine, producing an adorable and wholly unauthorised baby girl.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains new-found, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city from the machinations of a mysterious reptilian foe.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains new-found, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city from the machinations of a mysterious reptilian foe.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: When Po's long-lost panda father suddenly reappears, the reunited duo travels to a secret panda paradise to meet scores of hilarious new panda characters. When the supernatural villain Kai begins to sweep across China defeating all the kung fu masters, Po must do the impossible: learn to train a village full of his fun-loving, clumsy brethren to become the ultimate band of kung fu pandas.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: When Po's long-lost panda father suddenly reappears, the reunited duo travels to a secret panda paradise to meet scores of hilarious new panda characters. When the supernatural villain Kai begins to sweep across China defeating all the kung fu masters, Po must do the impossible: learn to train a village full of his fun-loving, clumsy brethren to become the ultimate band of kung fu pandas.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: The O'Connells must stop a mummy awoken from a 2000-year-old curse who threatens to plunge the world into his merciless, unending service. Doomed by a wronged sorceress, Zi Yuan, to spend eternity in suspended animation, the ruthless Dragon Emperor and his 10,000 warriors have laid forgotten for eons, entombed in clay as a vast, silent Terracotta Army.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Rick O'Connell returns to combat a long-entombed emperor who threatens to plunge the world into his merciless service, with the chase going from Shanghai to high into the Himalayas.

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of time when prehistoric creatures roamed the earth, Early Man tells the story of courageous caveman Dug and his sidekick Hognob who, together with their fearless new friend Goona, must unite their Stone Age Tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of time when prehistoric creatures roamed the earth, Early Man tells the story of courageous caveman Dug and his sidekick Hognob who, together with their fearless new friend Goona, must unite their Stone Age Tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: Can a clueless super spy save the day without denting the nation's pride, or his super-cool Aston Martin spy car?

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide
programme.desc: With both Internal Affairs and their main suspect on their tails, veteran police detective Joe and his rookie partner KC have to infiltrate the dangerous world of the hip-hop recording industry.

programme.title: I Now Pronounce You Chuck & Larry
National Security
programme.desc: Everyone wants them dead, but they might just kill each other first. Two police academy rejects are at each other's throats and on the case of a smuggler with friends in high places.
